urdu transliteration text: Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
english translation text: Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam

urdu transliteration text:
Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
Mere darwaze te likhya panjaan baara da naa howay
english translation text:
Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam
One where the entrance has the names of the 5 and the 12.

urdu transliteration text:
Milade mustafa mola me apne ghar karauna ae
Hasan maula da dastarkhaa vede bich sajauna ae
english translation text:
One where I hold the Milad of Muhammad
One where I spread a feast in the name of Maula Hasan

urdu transliteration text: Khuwan wa me jitthe langar koi aesi wi tthaa howay
english translation text: One where I feed the poor, there should be such an abode

urdu transliteration text: Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
english translation text: Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam

urdu transliteration text:
Zahur e murtaza teraa rajab nu me manawanga
Mahe shabaan vich har saal sara ghar sajawnaga
english translation text:
The birth of Murtaza on 13th Rajab, I will celebrate
Every year, in the month of Shabaan, my home, I will decorate

urdu transliteration text: Aave nauroz khushiyaan da mere ghar vich sama howay
english translation text: On the eve of Nauroz, in my home, there shall be celebration

urdu transliteration text: Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
english translation text: Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam

urdu transliteration text:
vazu akkhiyaan da hojaawe alam di deed jad howay
Kise maulayi momin de dua koi na radd howay
Oh Maula, don't decline any desires of any momin
english translation text: Oh Maula, My eyes shall do vuzu, when laying the eyes upon the alam

urdu transliteration text: Sukhaan da chan rave chadh da dukhaan da har din paraan howay
english translation text: The moon of happiness shall continue to shine, the days of sorrow shall remain far away

urdu transliteration text: Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
english translation text: Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam

urdu transliteration text:
Dua poori howay jis vele o vela wakha maula
Oo din khurshid di tun zindagi te vich reyaa maula
english translation text:
Show me that moment, when He accepts prayers, Oh Maula
Show me the day, in my life, oh Maula

urdu transliteration text: Shahidan da zikar howay aayi zainab di maa howay
english translation text: When there is commemoration of the Martyrs, Hussain's mother is present

urdu transliteration text: Maula mera ve ghar howay uttay almaan di chaan howay
english translation text: Maula there should be a home that I call my own, one in constant shade of an alam
